hero.title: Web3 AI Skills
hero.subtitle: Give your AI agent real Web3 context

skills.heading: Skills
skills.subheading: Browse AI context skills for Web3 development
benchmark.title: AgentRel Benchmark
home.buildDappDesc: Pick skills by chain for development
home.why1Desc: Targeted corrections for the most common AI mistakes (Solana web3.js v1 vs v2, ethers v5 vs v6). Stop your agent from generating outdated code.
home.why2Desc: Track changes across multi-chain ecosystems — SDK upgrades, API changes, and best-practice updates reflected in your agent context immediately.
home.why3Desc: Covers grant program requirements, review criteria, and success stories across major ecosystems to help your agent give accurate funding advice.
home.ecosystemsDesc: Click to browse skills by ecosystem
submit.title: Submit a Skill
submit.desc: Share a Web3 AI Skill with the community. Paste the direct URL to a .md file with YAML frontmatter.
bundles.title: Bundles
bundles.desc: Pre-packaged skill collections for common Web3 development scenarios
